name: ASRock B860M PRO RS Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8666+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B860M PRO RS Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe
description: ASRock B860M PRO RS Micro-ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5 support, and connectivity for Intel LGA 1851.
